problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: If Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
